result:
Implemented reusable note templates across the CLI.

The main changes are in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L128), [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L640), [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L1037), and [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L1255). I added built-in `daily`, `meeting`, and `project` templates with default tags and scaffolded bodies, a new `template` command, and `create --template <name>` support. `today` now creates missing notes from the shared daily template instead of a blank shell, and non-create commands explicitly reject `--template`.

I also added coverage for the new flows in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go#L38), [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go#L62), [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go#L100), [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go#L118), and [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go#L757), and documented the new usage in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md#L9), [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md#L36), and [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md#L61).

I could not run `gofmt` or `go test` here because the sandbox does not have `go` or `gofmt` installed.
